items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the incentive integration feature, specifically the ability to complete a survey for a discount. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. As a result, the validation cannot be completed, leading to a blocked status due to inconclusive evidence.
